violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and ladle) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026
The ceiling tile in the kitchen area is in poor repair (old water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
